name: Compare AI vs human referrals for law firms—which better?
description: Hybrid best; AI fast, human accurate.[5][3]

mainEntity.name: Compare AI vs human referrals for law firms—which better?

acceptedAnswer.text: Hybrid best; AI fast, human accurate.[5][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Human better for nuance, AI faster/cheaper; hybrid ideal per tools.[5][4] NY firms blend both.[1] Factors: speed vs accuracy (AI errs like ChatGPT).[3] Test both via consults.
